overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character in a long coat exploring a foggy, ancient stone ruin environment at dusk. The character traverses narrow rocky passages, passes a large illuminated spider web, and walks through a marshy wetland area with distant campfires and wooden lamp posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow foggy canyon between rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky passage with cliffs on both sides

entered.detail: tall moss-covered stone cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
tall weathered stone cliff face forming the right wall of the canyon
gnarled dead tree branches hanging over the path
narrow dirt and grass trail winding through the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy canyon passage flanked by tall rocky cliffs on both sides. Twisted tree branches hang overhead, and the path is covered in grass and dirt. The atmosphere is dark and enclosed with limited visibility due to fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ruins with giant spider web

events.description: large illuminated spider web becomes visible between rock formations
turning left around stone corner reveals distant camp with firelight

agents.ego_description: approaching a large spider web and turning left around a stone corner to reveal a distant camp

entered.detail: giant illuminated spider web spanning between rock walls
ancient weathered stone blocks and ruins
warm orange firelight from distant camp structures

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive illuminated spider web stretched between rocks in ancient stone ruins. After observing the web, the character turns left around a stone corner, revealing distant campfire lights in the foggy marsh ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy wetlands with stone ruins and distant camp

events.description: ground transitions from dry grass to wet marsh with standing water

agents.ego_description: walking along a stone wall while approaching the marshy area with distant camp lights visible

entered.detail: tall ancient stone wall running alongside the path
shallow water and wet ground covering the trail
wooden fences and platforms of a distant camp

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a stone wall with distant camp lights visible through the fog. The ground transitions from grass to wet marsh with standing water. Wooden camp structures and barrels appear on the left as the character moves deeper into the wetland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy marsh path with wooden lamp posts

events.description: character passes a lit wooden lamp post on a rock pile
distant fire glow becomes more prominent on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy marsh following a path past wooden lamp posts

entered.detail: tall wooden post with a lit lantern on top sitting on a rock pile
leafless twisted trees silhouetted against the fog
orange-red glow of fire or lava visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open foggy marsh, passing a lit wooden lamp post mounted on a rock pile. The path continues into the mist with dead trees lining the route, while a distant fire glow becomes visible on the horizon. The environment is desolate and atmospheric with limited visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, foggy canyon into a desolate, open wetland at dusk. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage flanked by towering rocky cliffs and twisted overhead branches, where the atmosphere is dark and enclosed. As the path opens, the camera passes a massive illuminated spider web stretched across ancient stone ruins before turning a corner to reveal the distant glow of campfires through the mist. The scene then shifts as the ground transitions from grass to wet marshland, moving past stone walls and wooden camp barrels toward the heart of the wetlands. Finally, the camera glides past a lit wooden lamp post and dead trees, heading deeper into the fog toward a flickering fire on the horizon.
